nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Comprehensive guide (6 sections) for running Wingspan self-play training unattended in a container: describes the cloud architecture (S3-persisted, Spot-interruptible), image build steps, local smoke-test instructions, ECS Fargate Spot launch procedure, and the live monitoring command.

nodes.name: ecs-task-def.json
nodes.summary: Standalone AWS ECS Fargate task definition for the wingspan-trainer container: allocates 2 vCPU / 8 GB, wires execution and task IAM roles, routes logs to CloudWatch under /wingspan/trainer, and sets a 120-second stop timeout for graceful Spot-reclaim handling.
nodes.languageNotes: Template file — three placeholders (<ACCOUNT>, <REGION>) must be substituted before registering; designed as a Terraform-free alternative to main.tf for registering the task definition via the AWS CLI.

nodes.name: main.tf
nodes.summary: Terraform configuration that provisions the full durable AWS infrastructure for cloud training: an S3 bucket for run persistence, an ECS cluster with Fargate Spot as the default capacity provider, IAM execution and task roles scoped to the bucket prefix, a CloudWatch log group, and the ECS task definition for the trainer container.
nodes.languageNotes: Outputs cluster name, task family, and bucket name for scripted follow-on commands. The task definition's `command` is intentionally omitted so the per-run S3 config URI can be injected via `run-task --overrides` without re-registering the task definition.

nodes.name: aws_s3_bucket.runs
nodes.summary: S3 bucket that stores all training run artifacts: checkpoints, metrics, game logs, and status files, keyed under a configurable prefix.

nodes.name: aws_ecs_cluster.wingspan
nodes.summary: ECS cluster named 'wingspan' that hosts trainer tasks, configured to prefer Fargate Spot capacity for cost-efficient preemptible training.

nodes.name: aws_ecs_task_definition.trainer
nodes.summary: Fargate task definition for the wingspan-trainer container: 2 vCPU / 8 GB, awsvpc networking, 120-second stop timeout, CloudWatch log driver, wired to execution and task IAM roles.

nodes.name: aws_iam_role.task
nodes.summary: IAM role assumed by the running trainer container, granting scoped S3 GetObject, PutObject, and ListBucket permissions on the runs bucket.

nodes.name: aws_iam_role.task_execution
nodes.summary: ECS task execution IAM role granting Fargate the AmazonECSTaskExecutionRolePolicy permissions needed to pull the container image from ECR and ship logs to CloudWatch.

nodes.name: run.example.yaml
nodes.summary: Example cloud training run-file that configures a single named experiment: S3 bucket/prefix/region for persistence, sync cadences (status heartbeat, checkpoint upload, game-log chunking), and a full TrainConfig block with hyperparameters for a 5000-iteration self-play run.
nodes.languageNotes: The `train` block maps 1:1 onto wingspan.training.config.TrainConfig; omitted fields use TrainConfig defaults. No credentials are embedded — authentication is delegated to the AWS standard chain (IAM task role on Fargate, ~/.aws locally).
